examples: She pulled the strap of her nightgown onto her shoulder.
She was still in her nightgown, with her hair hanging loose over her shoulders.
She was wearing only a thin robe over a flimsy nightgown, and her feet were bare.
Police reports said she was found wearing a long nightgown, socks and a jacket.
The cold was like a remorseless living presence descending on her and gripping her under her nightgown.
